world.title: Open Hormuz or will obliterate power plants: Trump's 48-hour ultimatum to Iran
world.description: In a social media post, Trump said the United States would “hit and obliterate” Iranian power plants, beginning with the largest facility, if the waterway is not “fully open, without threat” within the specified timeframe.

world.title: Eid al-Fitr 2026: Catholic Bishops in Nigeria Urge Shared Commitment to Peace, Mauritian Bishop Emphasizes Hope
world.description: Eid al-Fitr, the festival of breaking the fast marking the end of the Holy Month of Ramadan, provides Nigerians of all faiths an opportunity to collaborate in advancing peace, justice, and national renewal, the Catholic Bishops in the West African nation have said.

world.title: Congo-Brazzaville: Congo's 'Nintendo Election' Was Rigged From the Start, Observer Says
world.description: Civil society groups in Congo-Brazzaville are challenging the integrity of last weekend's presidential election, which handed veteran leader Denis Sassou Nguesso a fifth term in office. Bertrand Menier Kounianga, spokesperson for the civil society platform CAPGED, tells RFI the vote was "rigged from start to finish".

world.title: Middle East crisis live: Trump threatens huge attack if Iran does not reopen strait of Hormuz within 48 hours
world.description: US president says he will ‘obliterate their various power plants, starting with biggest one first’

world.title: Chinese mining giant accused of poisoning Congo in toxic mine scandal linked to BMW, Mercedes, Peugeot, Volkswagen
world.description: A Chinese mining giant has been accused of polluting communities in the Democratic Republic of Congo, placing one of Africa’s most strategic cobalt operations at the centre of a growing global controversy linked to major automakers including BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Peugeot and Volkswagen. | Business Insider Africa

world.title: Italians are voting in a referendum on constitutional change
world.description: The dry subject matter of this weekend's vote seems obscure but for many it is a vote on the PM.

business.title: West Asia crisis hits smartphone supply, India shipment outlook cut again
business.description: Counterpoint Research scaled down its forecast for 2026 to 139 million units from 142 million projected earlier this year, while Omdia revised its numbers to 142-145 million from 148 million, with analysts cautioning that the developing situation might necessitate further downward revisions in the next quarter.

business.title: Large manufacturing units mull kitchen revamp amid LPG crisis
business.description: LPG shortages linked to the West Asia war are pushing Indian manufacturing firms to plan energy-resilient kitchens. Companies are sourcing cylinders, using firewood, and adjusting menus while avoiding disruptions. Facility managers are preparing contingency plans, including shifting to induction and alternative equipment, amid ongoing uncertainty over fuel availability and supply continuity.

business.title: Akemi Hair Glow Claims Evaluated: 2026 Hair Growth Transparency Report Examines DHT-Blocking Spray Research, "56% Thicker Hair" Data, and Ingredient Research for Women
business.description: A 2026 informational report presenting Akemi Hair Glow's DHT-blocking claims alongside ingredient-level research context, topical delivery positioning, pricing structure, and key verification factors for consumers evaluating hair growth products

business.title: India’s dual dependence on West Asia for urea production
business.description: Data indicate that the US-Israel and Iran war threatens both domestic urea production and the stability of its supply chain.

business.title: What is the WA government saying about fuel disruption amid the Middle East war?
business.description: As West Australians feel the effects of skyrocketing fuel amid the Middle East conflict, the government is treading the line between raising the alarm and sensible action, writes Courtney Withers.

business.title: GHA DISCOVERY pauses D$ expiry till 30 September 2026
business.description: GHA DISCOVERY D$ will now be valid until 30 September 2026 at least, with the programme suspending expiry due to the situation in the Middle East.

science.title: Brenham Fire Department responds to reports of an explosion as meteor sightings spread online
science.description: A report of a possible explosion near Highway 50 and Wiedeville Road prompted a response from the Brenham Fire Department, but crews found no evidence of an explosion after arriving on scene.

science.title: Artemis II rocket arrives to launch pad after slow rollout ahead of April flight date
science.description: The Artemis II rocket that's to carry Canadian astronaut Jeremy Hansen around the moon made its way Friday to the launch pad ahead of its planned April blastoff.

science.title: Scientists Unearth Exceptionally Well-preserved Archaeopteryx fossil, Solving the Biggest Mystery of Dinosaur Flight
science.description: A new discovery of a nearly intact Archaeopteryx fossil is providing fresh evidence that may finally settle the long-standing debate over how flight evolved

science.title: Viewers reports seeing flash of light and loud boom across Southeast Texas
science.description: Did you see, hear, or feel it? We’re seeing reports on social media and getting calls into our newsroom about a loud boom this afternoon.

science.title: Global scientists reveal how farming affects soil via new Earth-sensing technology
science.description: A global research team has used a new technique to capture minute-scale structural changes in farmland soil, revealing how farming practices influence soil water dynamics, Xinhua reports.

science.title: Houston meteor explosion? People share photos from Texas; ‘saw something burn up’
science.description: A meteor reportedly may have exploded somewhere in west Houston and people online shared photos.

science.title: Saturn, Jupiter moon count rises to record-breaking as astronomers discover new satellites
science.description: Astronomers have identified 11 new moons orbiting Saturn, bringing its total number of known satellites to 285. At the same time, Jupiter’s moon count has surpassed 100 for the first time, following the discovery of four additional moons, Qazinform News Agency correspondent reports.

ai.title: Mark Cuban Says AI Revolution Is Easier For White Collar Workers Than PC Revolution, Predicts Job Cuts At Big Companies
ai.description: Mark Cuban warned that workers must quickly adopt AI skills to stay competitive as technology reshapes jobs.

ai.title: 4 Agri-Tech stocks to watch as India pivots to precision farming solutions
ai.description: India’s agriculture sector is undergoing a structural shift from traditional expansion to technology-driven productivity, fuelled by government schemes like RKVY and AI adoption. This analysis evaluates four key players—PI Industries, Kaveri Seed, Jain Irrigation, and UPL—detailing how their specific focus on crop science, seed tech, and water management is redefining the risk-reward profile for long-term investors.

ai.description: Mr Miliband said that 'future demand from data centres, and interaction with wider energy system demands, remains inherently uncertain.'

ai.title: I Let AI Pick My Oscars Ballot. It Messed up Oddly, but Still Won.
ai.description: Alistair Barr's AI-assisted Oscars ballot, powered by Anthropic's Claude, outperformed despite missing some categories.

ai.title: OpenAI plans to almost double its headcount this year, FT says
ai.description: The maker of AI assistant ChatGPT will look to increase headcount to about 8,000 from about 4,500, according to the Financial Times.
